items.title: Respond to Gabriel (Engramme) about new term sheet and schedule call before they sign
items.context: Email from gabriel@engramme.com on Jun 2: 'The round construction has changed significantly since we last talked. We received a new term sheet. Before signing term sheets, we wanted to see if there's a way for us to work together. Do you have a few minutes to catch up?'

items.title: Schedule catch-up call with Boris (Blast Security) about the round — available Friday or Monday AM
items.context: Email from borisv@blast.security on Jun 4: 'I would love to catch up either Friday or Monday morning. Please let me know which day works better for you.' Richie had reached out Jun 3 saying 'I wanted to quickly touch base with you on the round you're pulling together... Derek and I came away impressed with your demo.'

items.title: Follow up with CTC team on whether they presented Aembit to LY
items.context: Email from kdiaz@aembit.io on Jun 2: 'Hi CTC team, have you been able to present Aembit to LY yet? Anything we can do to help?' — Fin Capital is cc'd on the CTC intro thread.

items.title: Review Unstructured Series C VC Tracker spreadsheet and engage on Series C process
items.context: Email from brian@unstructured.io on Jun 2: Brian Raymond shared 'Series_C_VC_Tracker_May2026' spreadsheet and added Derek as editor. Series C process appears to be actively underway.

items.title: Prep for Workday <> Fin Capital Quarterly Catch-up (June 10)
items.context: Calendar event 'Workday <> Fin Capital Quarterly Catch-up' on Jun 10 with Workday attendees (michael.magaro, barbry.mcgann, sarah.ospina, caroline.rafferty, jeffrey.wantman, richa.ray, savannah.greene) — quarterly LP/strategic meeting.
